facilities.name: Sunrise of Beverly Hills
facilities.description: Sunrise of Beverly Hills is an assisted living and memory care community on North Crescent Drive in Beverly Hills, operated by Sunrise Senior Living. The community also offers short-term respite stays.

facilities.name: Silverado Beverly Place Memory Care Community
facilities.description: Silverado Beverly Place is a specialized memory care community in Los Angeles dedicated to residents living with Alzheimer's disease and other dementias. It is centrally located near Beverly Hills and West Hollywood and is operated by memory care specialist Silverado.

facilities.name: Brookdale Camarillo
facilities.description: Brookdale Camarillo is an assisted living and memory care community on Santa Rosa Road in Camarillo, in Ventura County. It is operated by Brookdale Senior Living, one of the largest senior living operators in the United States.

facilities.name: Belmont Village Sabre Springs
facilities.description: Belmont Village Sabre Springs is an assisted living and memory care community in the Sabre Springs area of San Diego. The residential care facility is licensed for 184 beds and is operated by Belmont Village Senior Living.

facilities.name: Vi at La Jolla Village
facilities.description: Vi at La Jolla Village is a Life Plan Community (continuing care retirement community) in San Diego's University City/La Jolla area. The campus offers independent living plus a care center with assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing at 4171 Las Palmas Square.

facilities.name: The Cove at La Jolla
facilities.description: The Cove at La Jolla is a 59-bed Medicare-certified skilled nursing facility near the coast in La Jolla. The facility is affiliated with The Ensign Group.

facilities.name: San Francisco Towers
facilities.description: San Francisco Towers is a nonprofit continuing care retirement community on Pine Street in San Francisco. It brings independent living apartments, assisted living suites, a memory-support neighborhood, and a Medicare-certified skilled nursing and rehabilitation center together on one site. It is operated by Front Porch (formerly Covia Communities).

facilities.name: San Francisco Campus for Jewish Living
facilities.description: The San Francisco Campus for Jewish Living is a nonprofit senior care campus on Silver Avenue in San Francisco. Its skilled nursing center (licensed as Jewish Home & Rehab Center D/P SNF) is Medicare- and Medicaid-certified with 362 certified beds and provides long-term care and rehabilitation services.

facilities.name: Oakmont of Mariner Point
facilities.description: Oakmont of Mariner Point is an assisted living and memory care community at Mariner Square in Alameda, on the east side of San Francisco Bay. It is operated by Oakmont Senior Living and offers personal care, meals, medication management, and 24-hour staffing.

facilities.name: Eskaton Land Park
facilities.description: Eskaton Land Park (formerly Eskaton Monroe Lodge) is an independent living community in Sacramento's Land Park neighborhood, near Sacramento City College and William Land Park. The six-story community offers private apartments, restaurant-style dining, and around-the-clock staff, and is operated by the nonprofit Eskaton.

facilities.name: Atria Carmichael Oaks
facilities.description: Atria Carmichael Oaks is a senior living community on Fair Oaks Boulevard in Carmichael, in the Sacramento metro area, next to Jensen Botanical Garden. It offers independent living, assisted living, and memory care with 24-hour staff, and is operated by Atria Senior Living.

facilities.name: ACC Care Center
facilities.description: ACC Care Center is a nonprofit, 99-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Sacramento's Pocket/Greenhaven area, operated by ACC Senior Services.

facilities.name: The Terraces at San Joaquin Gardens
facilities.description: The Terraces at San Joaquin Gardens is a continuing care retirement community on North Fresno Street in Fresno. It offers maintenance-free independent living, assisted living, memory care, and long-term skilled nursing with post-acute rehabilitation on one campus, and is part of the nonprofit HumanGood family of communities.

facilities.name: Oakmont of Fresno
facilities.description: Oakmont of Fresno is an assisted living and memory care community on North Gates Avenue in northwest Fresno. It is operated by Oakmont Senior Living, a California-based operator of luxury senior living communities.

facilities.name: The Oaks at Paso Robles
facilities.description: The Oaks at Paso Robles is a senior living community on South River Road in Paso Robles, in San Luis Obispo County wine country. It offers independent living, assisted living, and memory care, and is operated by Westmont Living.

facilities.name: Care Home by RNs
facilities.description: Care Home by RNs is a small residential care facility for the elderly (RCFE) in Sacramento, licensed by the State of California to care for six residents in private room settings. The registered-nurse-operated board and care home also runs sister homes in Lincoln, California.

facilities.name: WellQuest of Elk Grove
facilities.description: WellQuest of Elk Grove is a resort-style senior living community offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care on East Stockton Boulevard. Residents have access to a pool, fitness classes, and restaurant-style dining.
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 94 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)

facilities.name: Oakmont of Roseville
facilities.description: Oakmont of Roseville is a luxury assisted living and memory care community on Secret Ravine Parkway near Sutter Roseville Medical Center.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 49 reviews on A Place for Mom; 9.7/10 review score based on 17 reviews in the last 2 years (July 2026)

facilities.name: Atria Rocklin
facilities.description: Atria Rocklin offers independent living, assisted living, and Life Guidance memory care in the hills of Rocklin near the Quarry District and Whitney Oaks Golf Club. The community features upscale amenities, chef-prepared dining, and discreet 24-hour support staff.
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 74 reviews on Birdeye; 4.6/5 across 90 all-time reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Oakmont of Folsom
facilities.description: Oakmont of Folsom is a luxury assisted living and memory care community on Creekside Drive with 73 licensed beds.

facilities.name: University Retirement Community
facilities.description: University Retirement Community is a nonprofit continuing care retirement community near UC Davis offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and a 37-bed Medicare-certified skilled nursing unit.
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 8 reviews on Caring.com; CMS overall rating 5 stars (July 2026)

facilities.name: Oakmont of Brookside
facilities.description: Oakmont of Brookside provides assisted living and memory care in Stockton's Brookside neighborhood.
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 54 reviews on Birdeye; 4.6/5 across 52 all-time reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Vienna Nursing and Rehabilitation Center
facilities.description: Vienna Nursing and Rehabilitation Center is a 150-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility that has served Lodi since 1967, providing skilled nursing, short-term rehabilitation, and hospice services.

facilities.name: Dale Commons
facilities.description: Dale Commons is an MBK Senior Living community in north Modesto offering independent living and assisted living with 24/7 residential care and support with daily activities.

facilities.name: Merced Senior Living
facilities.description: Merced Senior Living (formerly Pacifica Senior Living Merced) is a 93-bed community offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and respite care. Chef-prepared meals are served restaurant-style, and a full activity calendar includes art classes, gardening, and community outings.
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 32 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)

facilities.name: Quail Park on Cypress
facilities.description: Quail Park on Cypress is a senior living campus across from Kaweah Health Medical Center's Cypress campus, offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care in studio to two-bedroom residences.
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 22 all-time reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.1/5 across 62 aggregated reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)

facilities.name: Bayshire Riverwalk Senior Living
facilities.description: Bayshire Riverwalk Senior Living (formerly Brookdale Riverwalk) is a full-service continuing care retirement community near Bakersfield's Riverwalk with capacity for 376 residents, offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing.
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 112 all-time reviews on A Place for Mom (largely under the former Brookdale Riverwalk name); 4.5/5 on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)

facilities.name: Sycamore Glen
facilities.description: Sycamore Glen is an active senior community in Chico that is also licensed for assisted living, with staff available to support activities of daily living such as bathing, dressing, and mobility.
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 rating with 34 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)

facilities.name: Oakmont of Redding
facilities.description: Oakmont of Redding is a luxury assisted living and memory care community on Bechelli Lane with views of the nearby river and mountains. Amenities include a salon, private movie theater, resident gardens, and executive chef dining.
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 33 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter; 9.9/10 A Place for Mom review score across 41 reviews with 84% five-star (July 2026)

facilities.name: The Palms at Bonaventure
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 33 reviews on SeniorAdvisor; A Place for Mom review score 9.9/10 across 46 reviews (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community on North Wells Road in east Ventura. Amenities include a gym, library, game room, and on-site salon.

facilities.name: Belmont Village Thousand Oaks
facilities.description: Mediterranean-style assisted living and memory care community with views of the Santa Monica Mountains, offering 105 assisted living residences plus a separate secured memory care neighborhood with 34 private apartments. A U.S.

facilities.name: Maravilla
facilities.description: Luxury senior living community on Calle Real established in 2002, offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care on a large resort-style campus. Pet-friendly, with 12-16 hour nursing and a 24-hour call system.

facilities.name: Merrill Gardens at Santa Maria
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 average across 51 reviews on A Place for Mom; APFM recent review score 9.4/10 (July 2026)
facilities.description: Independent living, assisted living, and memory care community in northeast Santa Maria operated by family-owned Merrill Gardens. Property features include a swimming pool, communal dining room, on-site restaurant, and library.

facilities.name: The Californian
facilities.description: Skilled nursing and rehabilitation facility on De La Vina Street that has served the Santa Barbara community since 1963.

facilities.name: San Luis Post Acute Center
facilities.description: Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in San Luis Obispo offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term care. The 162-bed facility is among the highest-rated nursing homes on the Central Coast.

facilities.name: The Park Lane
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 average across 117 all-time reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026); note APFM's recent-2-year score is lower at 5.6/10
facilities.description: Large Pacifica Senior Living community in the Monterey hills offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and respite care. Resort-style, pet-friendly campus with chef-prepared meals, creative arts programs, and garden views near Del Monte Shopping Center.

facilities.name: The Cottages of Carmel
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 21 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community on Carmel Rancho Boulevard near Carmel-by-the-Sea. Costs start around $6,120 per month.

facilities.name: Madonna Gardens Assisted Living and Memory Care
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 24 all-time reviews on A Place for Mom; APFM recent review score 9.4/10 (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community in Salinas known for beautifully landscaped courtyards with water features and a lush interior garden. Amenities include an in-house salon, fitness room, library nook, and elegant dining room, with weekly housekeeping and transportation to medical appointments.

facilities.name: Aegis Living Aptos
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 15 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community in Aptos, just south of Santa Cruz, operated by West Coast senior living company Aegis Living.

facilities.name: Sequoia Springs Senior Living Community
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 18 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Independent living, assisted living, and memory care community in Fortuna, about 20 minutes south of Eureka and the highest-rated senior living option in the Humboldt County area. Assisted living shared rooms start around $2,250 per month, well below coastal California averages.

facilities.name: Atria Golden Creek
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 79 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026); 111 reviews on A Place for Mom
facilities.description: Atria Golden Creek offers independent living, assisted living and memory care in studio, one- and two-bedroom apartments overlooking San Diego Creek in Irvine. Amenities include multiple dining venues, a fitness center, movie theater, library, and salon and day spa. U.S. News has rated it a Best Senior Living community for assisted living based on resident and family surveys.

facilities.name: Walnut Village
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 12 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)
facilities.description: Walnut Village is a continuing care retirement community in Anaheim offering independent living, assisted living, memory care and skilled nursing on one campus. The community, operated by nonprofit Front Porch, features a library, swimming pool and fitness center, and was named Continuing Care Retirement Community of the Year 2010 by 50+ Builders Magazine.

facilities.name: Huntington Terrace
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 119 reviews on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026); 4.2/5 across 45 reviews on Caring.com
facilities.description: Huntington Terrace is an MBK Senior Living community on a 3.5-acre campus in Huntington Beach offering assisted living and memory care. The community has served Huntington Beach families for over 30 years and provides 12-16 hour nursing, 24-hour supervision and a secure memory care neighborhood. U.S. News has rated it a Best Senior Living community for assisted living.

facilities.name: Morningside of Fullerton
facilities.description: Morningside of Fullerton is a Life Plan Community (CCRC) set on 33 landscaped acres in north Orange County, offering independent living, assisted living, memory care and skilled nursing. Resort-style amenities include golf, pickleball, bocce, a saltwater pool, fitness center and spa, and multiple dining venues, with more than 200 monthly classes, clubs and activities.

facilities.name: Atria Del Sol
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 131 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Atria Del Sol offers independent living, assisted living and memory care in Mission Viejo, with apartments overlooking a golf course. The community runs a full-time activities program with exercise classes, live entertainment and frequent outings, and reports a 91% resident satisfaction rate.

facilities.name: Crestavilla
facilities.review_note: 5.0/5 across 11 reviews on Yelp and 5.0 rating on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026); 42 reviews on A Place for Mom
facilities.description: Crestavilla is a luxury Kisco Signature senior living community in Laguna Niguel offering independent living, assisted living and memory care in a 250-bed campus near Crown Valley Parkway. U.S.

facilities.name: St. Catherine Healthcare
facilities.description: St. Catherine Healthcare is a 99-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Fullerton offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term care.

facilities.name: Citrus Place
facilities.review_note: 4.9/5 rating with 107 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Citrus Place is an MBK Senior Living community in Riverside offering independent living, assisted living and memory care. U.S. News lists it among assisted living communities in the area.

facilities.name: Estancia del Sol
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 67 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Estancia del Sol is a 135-bed senior living community with Spanish-style architecture in Corona, offering independent living, assisted living, memory care and respite stays.

facilities.name: Vineyard Ranch at Temecula
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 66 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026); 9.6/10 APFM review score over last 2 years
facilities.description: Vineyard Ranch at Temecula is an assisted living and memory care community in the Temecula wine country area, owned by Northstar Senior Living.

facilities.name: WellQuest of Murrieta
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 20 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)
facilities.description: WellQuest of Murrieta, formerly Renaissance Village Murrieta, is a senior living community established in 2017 offering independent living, assisted living, memory care and respite care.

facilities.name: Atria Rancho Mirage
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 113 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026); 9.2/10 APFM review score over last 2 years
facilities.description: Atria Rancho Mirage offers independent living, assisted living and memory care in the Coachella Valley. News has rated it a Best Senior Living community for assisted living based on resident and family surveys.

facilities.name: Mission Commons
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 rating with 79 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Mission Commons is an independent living community in Redlands located about a third of a mile from Loma Linda University Heart & Surgical Hospital. Residents receive three chef-prepared meals a day and enjoy a heated pool, library, salon, fitness gym and game rooms; residents needing care can hire outside home-care agencies.

facilities.name: Ivy Park at Alta Loma
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 56 reviews on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026); 9.4/10 APFM review score across 53 reviews
facilities.description: Ivy Park at Alta Loma, formerly Sunrise of Alta Loma, offers assisted living, memory care and respite care in Rancho Cucamonga. U.S. News lists it among senior living communities in the area.

facilities.name: MorningStar of Pasadena
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 average overall experience across 74 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community on South Fair Oaks Avenue in Pasadena, operated by MorningStar Senior Living.

facilities.name: Sparr Heights Estates Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 average overall experience across 49 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community on Honolulu Avenue in the Montrose/Sparr Heights neighborhood of Glendale, operated by Sinceri Senior Living. Services include 24-hour supervision, medication management, and specialized memory care programming, with assisted living base rents starting around $4,300 per month.

facilities.name: Belmont Village Senior Living Burbank
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 average overall experience across 43 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community in downtown Burbank operated by Belmont Village Senior Living. U.S.

facilities.name: Brookdale South Bay
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 average overall experience across 43 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Independent living retirement community on Torrance Boulevard in Torrance, part of the national Brookdale Senior Living network. Amenities include a library, arts and crafts studio, game room, and outdoor putting green, with housekeeping, dining, transportation, and concierge services handled by community staff.

facilities.name: Alamitos Belmont Health and Rehabilitation
facilities.description: 94-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in the Belmont Heights area of Long Beach offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term care.

facilities.name: Savant of Santa Monica
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 average overall experience across 35 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Senior living community on 17th Street in Santa Monica offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and respite stays.

facilities.name: Motion Picture & Television Hospital Skilled Nursing Facility
facilities.description: Nonprofit skilled nursing facility on the Motion Picture & Television Fund's Wasserman Campus in Woodland Hills, historically serving entertainment industry members and their families.

facilities.name: Northridge Valley Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.9/5 average overall experience across 249 reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.9 stars across 300+ aggregated reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community on Lindley Avenue in the Northridge neighborhood of the San Fernando Valley, formerly known as Pacifica Senior Living Northridge.

facilities.name: Discovery Commons Whittier
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 average overall experience across 56 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community on Burgess Avenue in Whittier, formerly known as Whittier Place Senior Living and now operated by Discovery Senior Living.

facilities.name: Bellamar Lancaster
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 average overall experience across 25 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community on 30th Street West in Lancaster, in the Antelope Valley, formerly known as Prestige Assisted Living at Lancaster. Under its previous operator the community earned a deficiency-free survey from California state regulators, surpassing federal and state standards in every area of care, service, and safety.

facilities.name: Hollenbeck Palms
facilities.description: Independent nonprofit continuing care retirement community established in 1890, set on eight and a half acres of gardens in the Boyle Heights neighborhood of Los Angeles.

facilities.name: Solheim Senior Community
facilities.review_note: 9.8/10 review score on A Place for Mom across 23 reviews (75% five-star); 4.4/5 across 11 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)
facilities.description: Nonprofit senior community in the Eagle Rock neighborhood of Los Angeles, serving seniors since 1923 as a registered 501(c)(3) organization.

facilities.name: Silverado Escondido Memory Care Community
facilities.description: Silverado Escondido is a dedicated memory care community licensed for 104 beds in north Escondido. Part of the national Silverado memory care organization, it provides personal care, meals, medication management, and 24-hour supervision for residents living with Alzheimer's disease and other dementias.

facilities.name: Westmont at San Miguel Ranch
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 35 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Westmont at San Miguel Ranch offers independent living, assisted living, and memory care in the San Miguel Ranch neighborhood of Chula Vista. The community is operated by Westmont Living.

facilities.name: Fairwinds - Ivey Ranch
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 25 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Fairwinds - Ivey Ranch is a Leisure Care retirement community in Oceanside offering independent living and assisted living. It has been named among U.S.

facilities.name: La Vida Real
facilities.description: La Vida Real is a Spanish-style senior living community on 11 landscaped acres in the Rancho San Diego area of El Cajon, licensed for 177 beds. It offers independent living, assisted living, and memory care, plus The Club program for early- to mid-stage memory loss, and is the only CARF-accredited senior living community in East County San Diego.

facilities.name: Poway Gardens Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 30 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Poway Gardens Senior Living is a memory-care-focused campus of seven independently licensed buildings, including five six-bed ranch-style Garden Villas and two larger residences, totaling 86 beds.

facilities.name: Alta Vista Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 48 reviews on Caring.com and 4.5/5 across 130 reviews on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)
facilities.description: Alta Vista Senior Living offers assisted living and memory care in Vista, with chef-prepared dining, housekeeping, and a pet-friendly campus.

facilities.name: GlenBrook Health Center
facilities.description: GlenBrook Health Center is a Medicare-certified skilled nursing facility with 94 certified beds on the La Costa Glen campus in Carlsbad, also offering assisted living, memory care, and short-term rehabilitation.

facilities.name: The Glen at Scripps Ranch
facilities.review_note: 4.9/5 across 83 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: The Glen at Scripps Ranch is a continuing care retirement community in the Scripps Ranch neighborhood of San Diego, offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing on one campus.

facilities.name: Merrill Gardens at Bankers Hill
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 31 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Merrill Gardens at Bankers Hill offers independent living, assisted living, and memory care in San Diego's Bankers Hill neighborhood near Balboa Park. The community is part of Merrill Gardens, a Seattle-based family of senior living communities, and earns strong marks from residents and families.

facilities.name: Westmont of Encinitas
facilities.review_note: 4.9/5 across 46 reviews on Birdeye; rated 5.0 (Excellent) on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)
facilities.description: Westmont of Encinitas is a Westmont Living community offering independent living and assisted living with individualized care plans, a few minutes from the North County coast.

facilities.name: Seacrest Village at Encinitas
facilities.description: Seacrest Village at Encinitas is a not-for-profit continuing care retirement community founded in 1944 as the San Diego Hebrew Homes, offering independent living, assisted living, the Katzin Memory Care Suites, and skilled nursing in the 58-bed Dorothy & Joseph Goldberg Healthcare Center.

facilities.name: Coterie Cathedral Hill
facilities.review_note: 4.9/5 across 104 aggregated family reviews on EveryPlace (July 2026); 41 reviews on A Place for Mom with a 9.2/10 review score
facilities.description: Luxury high-rise senior living community that opened in 2022 at 1001 Van Ness Avenue in San Francisco's Cathedral Hill neighborhood, offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care across 209 residences. Amenities include multiple dining venues, a wellness and fitness center with heated pool, a theater, and a rooftop terrace. Developed by Related Companies with Atria Senior Living under the Coterie brand.

facilities.name: Merrill Gardens at Rockridge
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 overall experience across 18 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Newer senior living community in Oakland's Rockridge neighborhood offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care, with architecture designed to match the classic character of the area. Located close to the dining and retail of College Avenue and BART.

facilities.name: Belmont Village Albany
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 overall experience across 22 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Opened in 2017 near Berkeley, this 175-apartment community offers independent living, assisted living, and memory care with a licensed nurse on site 24/7. Belmont Village Albany has a programming affiliation with UC Berkeley that brings professor-led lectures and intergenerational activities to residents, and chef-prepared meals are served at the community's Josephine's Kitchen.

facilities.name: Oakmont of Montecito
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 overall experience across 44 reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.5 stars on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)
facilities.description: Luxury assisted living and memory care community in east Concord operated by Oakmont Senior Living. The campus is large, with landscaped courtyards and resort-style common areas.

facilities.name: Byron Park
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 average across 91 family reviews on EveryPlace; 4.6 review average via Oasis Senior Advisors (July 2026)
facilities.description: Independent living and assisted living community in Walnut Creek's Tice Valley area, operating since 1991 as part of Kisco Senior Living. Residents compare the well-kept grounds, courtyard gardens, and pool to a boutique hotel, and the community runs a busy calendar of exercise classes, live music, and cultural outings with scheduled daily transportation.

facilities.name: Atria Tamalpais Creek
facilities.review_note: 4.5 stars across 39 reviews on Birdeye; 47 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Senior residential community near downtown Novato offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care, set among redwood trees with an outdoor garden and fountain. Operated by Atria Senior Living, which runs more than 100 communities nationwide.

facilities.name: Burlingame Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.6 stars across 193 reviews on Birdeye; 141 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: A 90-bed community across the street from Washington Park in Burlingame, formerly operated as Atria Burlingame, offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and respite stays. Nearly every apartment has scenic views, and the location is walkable to downtown Burlingame shops and restaurants.

facilities.name: The Sequoias Portola Valley
facilities.description: Residents can move through independent living, assisted living, and skilled nursing on one campus.

facilities.name: Merrill Gardens at Campbell
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 overall experience across 20 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Senior living community in downtown Campbell offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care. Rated the highest of the senior communities in Campbell by My Caring Plan.

facilities.name: Atria Willow Glen
facilities.review_note: 4.6 stars across 84 reviews on Birdeye; 4.4/5 overall experience across 128 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Large independent living, assisted living, and memory care community about four miles from downtown San Jose in the Willow Glen area. Operated by Atria Senior Living.

facilities.name: Vi at Palo Alto
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 19 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter (July 2026), supplementary to the CMS 5-star skilled nursing rating
facilities.description: Life Plan (continuing care) community on 23 acres of Stanford land on Sand Hill Road, offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing.

facilities.name: Sunny View Retirement Community
facilities.description: Continuing care retirement community in Cupertino operated by nonprofit Front Porch, offering independent living, assisted living, and on-campus skilled nursing.

facilities.name: Oakmont of Varenna
facilities.description: Luxury continuing care retirement community in Santa Rosa's Fountaingrove area, set on 30 acres overlooking a lake with 162 apartment and casita homes. Also known as Varenna at Fountaingrove, the community offers resort-style amenities including pools, a fitness center, a wine cave, and multiple dining venues. Operated by Oakmont Senior Living.

facilities.name: Nazareth Rose Garden of Napa
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 overall experience across 25 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: A 44-bed assisted living and memory care community in the city of Napa offering a 24-hour call system, round-the-clock supervision, and help with daily activities such as bathing, dressing, and medication management. Its smaller size gives residents a more homelike setting than the large campuses in the area, and families rate the care highly.

facilities.name: Carmel Village at Clovis
facilities.description: A resort-style senior living community in the heart of Clovis offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 63 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Marbella Visalia
facilities.description: An assisted living and memory care community in Visalia (formerly Prestige Assisted Living at Visalia).
facilities.review_note: 4.43/5 across 43 reviews on Caring.com (2026)

facilities.name: Atria Las Posas
facilities.description: An Atria assisted living and memory care community in Ventura County.
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 67 reviews on A Place for Mom (2026)

facilities.name: AlmaVia of Camarillo
facilities.description: A nonprofit, faith-based assisted living and memory care community in Camarillo, part of the Elder Care Alliance network.
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 16 reviews on A Place for Mom (2026)

facilities.name: Eskaton Village Grass Valley
facilities.description: An Eskaton assisted living and memory care community in Grass Valley with well-kept grounds and a home-like, secure setting.
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 10 reviews on A Place for Mom (2026)

facilities.name: Atria Grass Valley
facilities.description: An Atria assisted living and memory care community in Grass Valley.
facilities.review_note: Also 32 reviews on Caring.com and 20 on A Place for Mom (2026)

facilities.name: Valle Verde
facilities.description: A HumanGood nonprofit continuing care retirement community in Santa Barbara offering independent living, assisted living, and skilled nursing on beautiful grounds. Named a U.S. News Best Senior Living community for assisted and independent living.
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 21 reviews on Caring.com (2026); on-site health center holds a 4-star CMS overall rating

facilities.name: Cypress Place
facilities.description: A Meridian Senior Living community in Ventura offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care.
facilities.review_note: 4.66/5 aggregated across web reviews (AssistedLiving.org); 40 reviews on A Place for Mom (2026)

facilities.name: Astoria Senior Living – Oakdale
facilities.description: A single-story assisted living and memory care community in Oakdale with cozy lounges, an enclosed courtyard, and a resident chef. Recognized in U.S. News & World Report's 2026 Best Assisted Living.
facilities.review_note: 5/5 across 12 reviews on Caring.com; 30 reviews on A Place for Mom (2026)

facilities.name: Ventura Townehouse
facilities.description: Ventura Townehouse is a large assisted living and memory care community in Ventura, offering extensive activities and maintained grounds.
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 82 reviews on A Place for Mom (2026)

facilities.name: The Reserve at Thousand Oaks
facilities.description: An MBK Senior Living community in Thousand Oaks offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and respite care. Amenities include on-site therapy, a fitness center, restaurant-style dining, and landscaped walking paths.

facilities.name: University Village Thousand Oaks
facilities.description: A continuing care retirement community in Thousand Oaks offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care with 24-hour care, dining, and medication management on a large campus.

facilities.name: Oakwood Gardens Care Center
facilities.description: A 104-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Fresno offering short-term rehabilitation, 24-hour skilled nursing, long-term care, complex wound care, and hospice.

facilities.name: The Vistas Assisted Living and Memory Care
facilities.description: The Vistas Assisted Living and Memory Care is an assisted living and memory care community in Redding.
facilities.review_note: 4.64/5 across 21 reviews on aggregator platforms; Google 4.3 (2026)

facilities.name: Cypress Ridge Care Center
facilities.description: A 99-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Monterey with a restful, scenic setting and 24-hour licensed nursing.

facilities.name: The Heritage Downtown
facilities.description: An active-adult luxury independent living community in downtown Walnut Creek, within walking distance of shops and restaurants. Residents get restaurant-style dining at the on-site Newton's restaurant, a pool, gym, library, and movie theater. Winner of A Place for Mom's Best of Senior Living award four years running (2023-2026).
facilities.review_note: 4.9/5 average across 82 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Spring Lake Village
facilities.description: A continuing care retirement community set beside Spring Lake and Annadel State Park in east Santa Rosa, operated by nonprofit Front Porch. Known for its landscaped campus, dining, and extensive resident programming.
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 80 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026); U.S. News High Performing ratings for short-term rehab and long-term care

facilities.name: The Meadows of Napa Valley
facilities.description: A nonprofit life plan community in the city of Napa managed by Pacific Retirement Services, offering independent living, assisted living, and skilled nursing on one campus.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 45 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)

facilities.name: Stoneridge Creek
facilities.description: The Bay Area's largest life plan community, a 50-acre campus in Pleasanton with resort-style amenities: restaurant-style dining venues, a fitness center and spa, swimming pools, and a performing arts center. Offers independent living plus on-campus assisted living and memory care. Part of the Continuing Life family of California communities.
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 116 reviews on Birdeye, matching the 4.7 Google rating cited by Seniorly (July 2026)

facilities.name: Heritage Estates
facilities.description: A large independent living and assisted living community in Livermore, named a U.S. News Best Senior Living community for both care levels based on resident and family surveys.
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 31 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter.com; 14 additional reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Kensington Place Redwood City
facilities.description: A dedicated memory care community on El Camino Real in Redwood City, part of the Kensington Senior Living family. Care is organized around two neighborhoods for different stages of dementia, with licensed nurses on site around the clock. Seniorly ranks it in the top tier for activities among Peninsula memory care communities.
facilities.review_note: 4.9/5 across 21 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter.com (July 2026)

facilities.name: The Terraces of Los Gatos
facilities.description: Named a U.S. News Best Senior Living community for independent living, assisted living, and memory care. Residents like the walkable location near Los Gatos shopping and dining.
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 27 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter.com; CMS 5-star overall skilled nursing rating (July 2026)

facilities.name: Paradise Valley Estates
facilities.description: A gated nonprofit life plan community in Fairfield, originally founded by retired military officers, offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing. Its health center earned a 5-out-of-5 overall Medicare rating.
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 47 reviews on Birdeye; Medicare overall rating 5/5 (July 2026)

facilities.name: Prairie City Landing
facilities.description: A 200-bed community in Folsom offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care.
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 27 reviews on Birdeye; 4.6/5 across 11 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Aegis Living Fremont
facilities.description: An assisted living and memory care community on Walnut Avenue in central Fremont, part of the Aegis Living family.
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 32 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)

facilities.name: Channing House
facilities.description: A nonprofit continuing care retirement community in a high-rise in downtown Palo Alto, a short walk from University Avenue shops. Residents move through independent living, assisted living, and skilled nursing within the same building.
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 61 reviews on Birdeye; 51 family reviews averaging 4.5 stars on EveryPlace (July 2026)

facilities.name: Sierra Regency
facilities.description: A gated independent retirement community in Roseville, established in 1988, with full-kitchen one- and two-bedroom apartments. Amenities include an indoor heated pool and spa, putting green, chapel, library, Sunday champagne brunch, and 24-hour staffing. Meals, weekly housekeeping, and transportation are bundled into the monthly rate.
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 30 reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.9/5 rating shown on AssistedLivingCenter.com with 21 reviews (July 2026)

facilities.name: The Pines by Cogir
facilities.description: An independent living, assisted living, and memory care community in Rocklin, formerly operated as The Pines, A Merrill Gardens Community, and now part of Cogir Senior Living. The campus sits in the Whitney Ranch area of west Rocklin.
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 39 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Atria Covell Gardens
facilities.description: An assisted living and memory care community in north Davis operated by Atria Senior Living. Cost runs toward the high end for the Davis area.
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 18 resident and family reviews on SeniorSite; 35 reviews listed on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Sunrise of Fair Oaks
facilities.description: An assisted living and memory care community on Hazel Avenue in Fair Oaks, part of the national Sunrise Senior Living network. Recognized by U.S. News for Best Assisted Living and Best Memory Care.
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 average across 52 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Cogir of Stock Ranch Senior Living
facilities.description: An assisted living community in Citrus Heights, formerly a Brookdale community and now operated by Cogir Senior Living.
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 average across 104 reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.3/5 across 40 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)

facilities.name: The Peninsula Regent
facilities.description: An owner-occupied independent living community for seniors in downtown San Mateo, steps from shops and restaurants on Baldwin Avenue. Residents own their residences and share amenities including a pool, a gym with personal trainers, and daily dining.
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 25 reviews on Birdeye; 4.5/5 across 54 ratings on Senior Care Authority (July 2026)

facilities.name: St. Paul's Towers
facilities.description: A high-rise life plan community overlooking Lake Merritt in Oakland, operated by nonprofit Front Porch.
facilities.review_note: CMS/U.S. News overall nursing rating 5/5; consumer reviews average 4.4 on Oasis Senior Advisors with 18 additional reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)

facilities.name: The Commons on Thornton
facilities.description: A 128-bed licensed assisted living and memory care community in north Stockton, named Best Assisted Living and Best Memory Care by U.S. News & World Report. One of the highest consumer-rated senior communities in San Joaquin County.
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 59 Google reviews; 60 family reviews averaging 4.9 on EveryPlace (July 2026)

facilities.name: Oakmont of Santa Clarita
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 16 reviews on Caring.com; 4.4/5 across 14 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Luxury assisted living and memory care community on Newhall Ranch Road in the Valencia area of Santa Clarita. Residents cite larger-than-average apartments, a movie theater, and diabetic and medication-management support. Part of the Oakmont Senior Living portfolio, with a B+ state inspection grade above the California average.

facilities.name: Oakmont of Whittier
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 19 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Resort-style assisted living and memory care community on Whittier Boulevard, licensed for 97 residents (state license 198603479). Amenities include a movie theater, restaurant-style dining, and a full activity calendar including weekly happy hour.

facilities.name: Oakmont of Torrance
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 21 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026); Google 4.1 across 55 reviews
facilities.description: Modern assisted living and memory care community on Lomita Boulevard near Torrance Memorial Medical Center, licensed for 126 residents. One of the newer luxury senior living options in the South Bay.

facilities.name: Bay Towers at Bixby Knolls
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 77 reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.6 stars across 117 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: High-rise senior community in Long Beach's Bixby Knolls neighborhood offering independent living, assisted living, and respite stays. Monthly rates start lower than most coastal Los Angeles County communities, with chef-prepared meals, a fitness center, complimentary transportation, and organized outings.

facilities.name: Scholl Canyon Estates
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 38 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Independent living retirement community in the hills of east Glendale, established in 2000 and operated under the Gracious Retirement Living brand. Monthly rent includes three chef-prepared meals daily, weekly housekeeping, transportation, and a busy events calendar with live music, dances, and exercise classes. Live-in managers are on site around the clock.

facilities.name: Villa Gardens
facilities.review_note: Editorial inclusion: CMS 5-star on-site skilled nursing (Villa Gardens Health Center); consumer reviews thinner — 4.1/5 across 6 reviews on A Place for Mom, and Summer House memory care 4.5 stars across 14 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Named Pasadena's best retirement community by local publications multiple years running. Residents cite waitstaff dining, a 24-hour bistro, and a strong fitness program; it is an entrance-fee community at the premium end.

facilities.name: Vivante on the Coast
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 26 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Resort-style luxury assisted living and memory care community near the Newport Beach border, voted Best Senior Living in Orange County by LA Times readers in 2020. Known for made-to-order dining with extended hours, daily activity programming, and modern, hotel-like common spaces. U.S. News has rated it a Best Senior Living community for assisted living.

facilities.name: Emerald Court
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 48 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Kisco Senior Living community in west Anaheim offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care near Anaheim Medical Center. U.S. News has rated it a Best Senior Living community across all three care levels.

facilities.name: Ivy Park at Huntington Beach
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 63 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community on Yorktown Avenue, about two miles from the Huntington Beach shoreline; formerly Sunrise of Huntington Beach and now part of the Ivy Living portfolio.

facilities.name: Atria Newport Beach
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 66 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Modern senior living community near Hoag Hospital offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care. Apartments include smart-home features, and the campus has a fitness center, yoga studio, and movie theater.

facilities.name: Regents Point
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 14 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Nonprofit continuing care retirement community operated by HumanGood, set between UC Irvine and 347-acre Mason Regional Park. Offers independent living, assisted living, memory care, and on-campus skilled nursing (Regents Point-Windcrest), which has provided post-acute rehab in Orange County for over 30 years. Named a Best CCRC in U.S. News' 2026 Best Senior Living awards.

facilities.name: Oakmont of Orange
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 79 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Luxury assisted living and memory care community on The City Drive in Orange, close to UCI Medical Center and the Outlets at Orange. Offers restaurant-style dining and a full amenity package typical of the Oakmont portfolio.

facilities.name: Everest at The Groves of Tustin
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 59 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community on Bryan Avenue in Tustin, long known locally as The Groves of Tustin and now operated by Everest Senior Living. Offers studio and one-bedroom apartments plus a dedicated Generations memory care neighborhood with its own dining room, living room, and patio.

facilities.name: Discovery Commons Raincross
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 89 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community in Riverside, formerly Raincross at Riverside under Watermark and now part of Discovery Senior Living. U.S. News has rated it a Best Senior Living community for assisted living based on resident and family surveys.

facilities.name: Stonewall Gardens Assisted Living
facilities.review_note: 4.9/5 across 28 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Boutique assisted living community of roughly two dozen studio and one-bedroom apartments on North Palm Canyon Drive, notable as Southern California's first assisted living community built for LGBT seniors and friends.

facilities.name: Atria Park of Vintage Hills
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 126 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Retirement community in the Temecula wine country foothills offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care.

facilities.name: Brookdale Murrieta
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 65 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living community on Jackson Avenue in Murrieta, part of the national Brookdale Senior Living network.

facilities.name: Westmont of Escondido
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 69 reviews on A Place for Mom; A Place for Mom review score 9.6/10 on 26 reviews in the last 2 years (July 2026)
facilities.description: Downtown Escondido senior community, long known as Westmont Town Court, offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care. Includes three daily meals, weekly housekeeping, scheduled transportation, and group fitness and music programming.

facilities.name: The Pasea Senior Living
facilities.description: Resort-style community in the Otay Ranch area of Chula Vista offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care; it operated for years as St. Paul's Plaza before rebranding as The Pasea. Amenities include restaurant-style dining, on-site wellness services, and outdoor courtyards.

facilities.name: Bayshire Carlsbad
facilities.description: Continuing care retirement community on El Camino Real in Carlsbad combining assisted living, memory care, and a Medicare-certified skilled nursing center with 45 certified beds. Offers short-term rehabilitation and long-term care on the same campus, first Medicare-certified in 1999.

facilities.name: Belmont Village Encino
facilities.description: Belmont Village Encino is a 150-bed assisted living and memory care community on Ventura Boulevard in Sherman Oaks, on the border of Encino. The community is known for its hotel-style dining, licensed nurses on site, and its Circle of Friends memory support program.

facilities.name: Harbor Terrace Retirement Community
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 average across 46 reviews on A Place for Mom; review score 9.7/10 based on 15 reviews in the last 2 years (July 2026)
facilities.description: Harbor Terrace Retirement Community offers independent and assisted living in downtown San Pedro near the Port of Los Angeles.

facilities.name: Mt. San Antonio Gardens
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 132 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Mt. San Antonio Gardens is a not-for-profit continuing care retirement community on the Pomona-Claremont border, offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing on one campus of roughly 520 beds. It is among the highest-rated senior communities in the area, with a pool, gym, and extensive resident programming.

facilities.name: Hillcrest - A Remarkable Retirement Community
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 72 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Hillcrest (Brethren Hillcrest Homes) is a not-for-profit continuing care retirement community in La Verne with Craftsman-inspired architecture on a large foothill campus. Residents have access to a fitness center, aquatic center, and library, with independent living through skilled nursing all on site.

facilities.name: Claremont Manor
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 112 reviews on Birdeye (June 2026)
facilities.description: Claremont Manor is a continuing care retirement community operated by the not-for-profit Front Porch organization, blocks from the Claremont Colleges.

facilities.name: The Kensington Sierra Madre
facilities.review_note: Seniorly Community Score 9.9/10 based on 81 reviews, top 4% for resident satisfaction (July 2026)
facilities.description: The Kensington Sierra Madre is an assisted living and memory care community near Arcadia in the San Gabriel Valley foothills.

facilities.name: Merrill Gardens at West Covina
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 average across 25 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Merrill Gardens at West Covina offers independent living, assisted living, and memory care in a modern community next to West Covina's civic center.

facilities.name: Crescendo Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 average across 32 family reviews on EveryPlace; A Place for Mom review score 9.2/10 on 13 recent reviews (July 2026)
facilities.description: Crescendo Senior Living is an assisted living and memory care community in Placentia, in north Orange County.

facilities.name: Rowntree Gardens
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 47 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter; 73 reviews on A Place for Mom; CMS 5-star rated skilled nursing (July 2026)
facilities.description: Rowntree Gardens is a licensed not-for-profit continuing care retirement community in Stanton offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, skilled nursing, and rehabilitation.

facilities.name: Ivy Park at Seal Beach
facilities.description: Ivy Park at Seal Beach (formerly Sunrise of Seal Beach) offers independent living, assisted living, and memory care near Old Ranch Country Club.

facilities.name: Sea Bluffs
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 average across 59 ratings (SeniorAdvisor/My Caring Plan aggregate, July 2026)
facilities.description: Sea Bluffs, formerly The Fountains at Sea Bluffs by Watermark, is a senior living community on a coastal bluff in Dana Point offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care.

facilities.name: San Clemente Villas by the Sea
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 average across 20 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: San Clemente Villas by the Sea is an MBK Senior Living community offering assisted living, memory care, and short-term respite stays near the coast in San Clemente.

facilities.name: Menifee Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 average across 175 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Menifee Senior Living offers independent living, assisted living, memory care, and respite stays in the Sun City area of Menifee.

facilities.name: The Lakes at Banning
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 rating across 92 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter (2026)
facilities.description: The Lakes at Banning is a senior living community next to the Sun Lakes Country Club offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and respite care.

facilities.name: Wildwood Canyon Villa Assisted Living and Memory Care
facilities.description: Wildwood Canyon Villa is an assisted living and memory care community in the heart of Yucaipa.

facilities.name: Sterling Inn
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 174 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Sterling Inn is an independent and assisted living community in Victorville, serving the High Desert.

facilities.name: Merrill Gardens at Rancho Cucamonga
facilities.review_note: 4.9/5 average across 26 reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.8 stars on Google; state inspection grade A- (July 2026)
facilities.description: Merrill Gardens at Rancho Cucamonga offers independent living, assisted living, and memory care below the San Gabriel foothills.

facilities.name: Casa de las Campanas
facilities.review_note: 4.61/5 across 73 ratings on Senior Care Authority; on-site health center holds a CMS 5-star overall rating (July 2026)
facilities.description: Casa de las Campanas in Rancho Bernardo is the only not-for-profit Type A life plan community in San Diego County, offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, skilled nursing, and rehabilitation.

facilities.name: Paradise Village
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 average across 78 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Paradise Village is a resort-style senior community on 12 acres in National City, just south of San Diego, offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care. Amenities include a large indoor pool, a 212-seat theater, more than 200 monthly activities, and over 20 resident-run clubs.

facilities.name: Silvergate Fallbrook Retirement Residence
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 average across 119 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Silvergate Fallbrook has served North County San Diego seniors for more than 30 years, offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care on a 5-acre walkable campus in the hills of Fallbrook.

facilities.name: Sunrise of Danville
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 94 reviews on A Place for Mom; APFM review score 9.8/10 on 29 recent reviews (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community on Diablo Road in Danville, offering short-term respite stays alongside long-term care.

facilities.name: San Leandro Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 268 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living community near downtown San Leandro offering customized service plans and around-the-clock staffing.

facilities.name: Carefield Castro Valley Assisted Living and Memory Care
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 36 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community in Castro Valley with a dedicated mild-cognitive-focus program bridging assisted living and memory care. Amenities include an in-house salon, fitness room, library nook, gardens, weekly housekeeping and transportation to medical appointments.

facilities.name: The Courte at Citrus Heights
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 30 reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.1/5 across 38 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Dedicated memory care community on Sunrise Boulevard in Citrus Heights serving residents with Alzheimer's and other dementias. Care is built around Frontier's Montessori-inspired SPARK lifestyle program, and U.S. News has named it a Best Senior Living community for memory care based on resident and family surveys.

facilities.name: Vacaville Memory Care
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 286 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Stand-alone memory care community on Nut Tree Road in Vacaville dedicated to residents living with Alzheimer's disease and other dementias.

facilities.name: Cogir of Turlock
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 10 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Senior living community in Turlock offering independent living, assisted living and memory care on one campus. Residents with Alzheimer's and dementia are served through Cogir's Generations Memory Care program.

facilities.name: Sunshine Villa, A Merrill Gardens Community
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 44 reviews on A Place for Mom; APFM review score 9.1/10 on 14 recent reviews (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community in a landmark Victorian-style building within walking distance of the Santa Cruz Wharf, beach and boardwalk.

facilities.name: The Watermark at Almaden
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 40 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living, memory care and short-term-stay community in the Almaden Valley area of south San Jose.

facilities.name: Mountain View Assisted Living & Memory Care
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 31 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community on South Dora Street in Ukiah, one of the few licensed communities serving inland Mendocino County. Offers private and semi-private rooms with dedicated dementia-care programming for residents with cognitive impairment.

facilities.name: WellQuest of Granite Bay
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 33 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Newer assisted living and memory care community on Sierra College Boulevard in Granite Bay.

facilities.name: Belmont Village San Jose
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 73 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Large assisted living and memory care community on South Winchester Boulevard near Santana Row and the Winchester Mystery House.

facilities.name: Blossom Vale Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 56 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community on Hazel Avenue in Orangevale, about 25 miles northeast of downtown Sacramento.

facilities.name: The Ridge at Healdsburg
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 81 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community set on nine landscaped acres in the Healdsburg wine country, formerly known as Healdsburg Senior Living. The campus is known for its gardens and resident farm animals, with music therapy and intergenerational programs; it is currently managed by Brightwater Senior Living after earlier ownership changes.

facilities.name: Casa de Modesto Retirement Center
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 28 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Community-based nonprofit retirement center founded in 1965, offering multiple levels of care including independent living apartments, assisted living and memory care. Independent living residents choose from unfurnished studio, one- and two-bedroom apartments with transportation and support services.

facilities.name: The Park at Modesto
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 13 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Independent living community in north Modesto operated by family-owned Koelsch Communities. Designed for active seniors, with restaurant-style dining, housekeeping and a full activities calendar.

facilities.name: Truewood by Merrill, Modesto
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 75 reviews on A Place for Mom; APFM review score 9.7/10 on 22 recent reviews (July 2026)
facilities.description: Independent living community established in 1993 and operated under Merrill Gardens' Truewood brand. Offers pet-friendly studio, one- and two-bedroom homes with community dining and activities.

facilities.name: Prestige Assisted Living at Manteca
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 (4.57) across 14 ratings on Senior Care Authority (July 2026)
facilities.description: Assisted living community with a dedicated memory care unit on Empire Avenue in Manteca, operated by Pacific Northwest-based Prestige Care.

facilities.name: Dominican Oaks
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 (4.48) across 41 ratings on Senior Care Authority; Olera community sentiment 4.7/5 (July 2026)
facilities.description: Retirement community on Paul Sweet Road adjacent to Dominican Hospital in Santa Cruz, offering independent and assisted living.

facilities.name: The Magnolia of Millbrae
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 19 resident and family reviews on SeniorSite (July 2026)
facilities.description: Full-service retirement and assisted living community on Chadbourne Avenue in Millbrae, on the Peninsula between San Francisco and San Mateo.

organizations.name: Brookdale Senior Living
organizations.description: Brookdale Senior Living is one of the largest senior living operators in the United States, operating 541 communities across 41 states as of June 2026. The publicly traded company offers independent living, assisted living, memory care, and continuing care retirement communities.

organizations.name: Sunrise Senior Living
organizations.description: Sunrise Senior Living is one of the largest senior living operators in North America, headquartered in McLean, Virginia. As of 2026 it operates more than 240 independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities in the United States and Canada.

organizations.name: Atria Senior Living
organizations.description: Atria Senior Living, founded in 1996 and headquartered in Louisville, Kentucky, manages independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities in more than 200 locations across dozens of U.S. states, plus independent living communities in Canada.

organizations.name: Oakmont Senior Living
organizations.description: Oakmont Senior Living is a California-based operator of luxury assisted living and memory care communities. It operates senior living communities across California, Nevada, Colorado, and Hawaii, with most of its portfolio concentrated in California.

organizations.name: Eskaton
organizations.description: Eskaton is a nonprofit senior living and services provider founded in 1968 and headquartered in Carmichael, California. It serves more than 14,000 older adults annually across Northern California, from Nevada County to the Bay Area, with communities and services spanning independent living, assisted living, memory care, skilled nursing, and home-based care.

organizations.name: MorningStar Senior Living
organizations.description: Denver-based senior living operator with a portfolio of roughly 40 communities under operation or development, representing more than 5,000 units across 11 states in the Midwest and Western United States. The company focuses on independent living, assisted living, and memory care.

organizations.name: Sinceri Senior Living
organizations.description: Privately owned senior living management and development company headquartered in Vancouver, Washington, operating assisted living and memory care communities throughout the United States, including Sparr Heights Estates in Glendale, California.

organizations.name: Belmont Village Senior Living
organizations.description: Houston-based developer and operator of upscale assisted living and memory care communities, with roughly 33 communities across the United States and a strong presence in Southern California. Belmont Village communities emphasize licensed nursing, enrichment programming, and hospitality-style dining.

organizations.name: Savant Senior Living
organizations.description: California senior living operator running a small group of communities in the Los Angeles area, including Savant of Santa Monica and Savant of Alhambra. Its communities offer independent living, assisted living, memory care, and respite care.

organizations.name: Discovery Senior Living
organizations.description: Large national senior living developer and operator headquartered in Bonita Springs, Florida, managing communities across multiple brands including the Discovery Commons line. The company operates Discovery Commons Whittier in Los Angeles County.

organizations.name: Generations LLC
organizations.description: A family-owned senior living operator based in Clovis, California, developing and managing resort-style independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities.

organizations.name: Elder Care Alliance
organizations.description: A California nonprofit, faith-based provider of assisted living and memory care operating the AlmaVia communities with a mission focused on holistic, values-driven senior care.

organizations.name: HumanGood
organizations.description: One of the largest nonprofit senior living providers in the U.S., operating life plan communities and affordable housing with independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing.

organizations.name: Meridian Senior Living
organizations.description: A national operator of independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities, including Cypress Place in Ventura, California.

organizations.name: MBK Senior Living
organizations.description: A California-based operator of independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities across the western U.S., known for its Yum! dining and wellness programming.

organizations.name: Astoria Senior Living
organizations.description: An operator of assisted living and memory care communities in California's Central Valley, including locations in Oakdale and the greater Modesto area.

organizations.name: Front Porch
organizations.description: A nonprofit senior living provider formed by the 2021 merger of Front Porch and Covia, operating about 19 retirement and life plan communities, primarily in California, plus affordable housing programs. Its communities include Spring Lake Village in Santa Rosa and St. Paul's Towers in Oakland.

organizations.name: Pacific Retirement Services
organizations.description: A nonprofit organization that develops and manages continuing care retirement communities across the West and beyond, including The Meadows of Napa Valley. Known for large life plan campuses such as Mirabella Seattle and Rogue Valley Manor.

organizations.name: Continuing Life
organizations.description: A California family of large luxury life plan communities operating under the Continuing Life brand, including Stoneridge Creek in Pleasanton, University Village Thousand Oaks, and La Costa Glen in Carlsbad. Communities emphasize resort-style campuses with a full continuum of care.

organizations.name: Aegis Living
organizations.description: A privately held assisted living and memory care operator founded in 1997, with more than 35 boutique-style communities in Washington, California, and Nevada. Known for design-forward buildings and a strong staff-culture reputation.

organizations.name: Kensington Senior Living
organizations.description: An assisted living and memory care operator whose communities promise an extended aging-in-place license model, allowing residents to stay through higher care needs. Operates roughly ten communities on the East and West Coasts, including Kensington Place Redwood City.

organizations.name: Cogir Senior Living
organizations.description: The U.S. senior housing arm of Canada's Cogir Real Estate, operating about 90 independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities across the western U.S. Grew rapidly by acquiring former Brookdale and Merrill Gardens communities, including The Pines by Cogir in Rocklin.

organizations.name: Oakmont Management Group
organizations.description: Operator of the Oakmont Senior Living portfolio of luxury assisted living and memory care communities, concentrated in California. Communities emphasize resort-style amenities, chef-driven dining, and dedicated Traditions memory care neighborhoods.

organizations.name: Ivy Living
organizations.description: California senior living brand operating Ivy Park assisted living and memory care communities, many of them former Sunrise Senior Living locations. Affiliated with the Oakmont Management Group family of companies.

organizations.name: Kisco Senior Living
organizations.description: Privately held senior living operator founded in 1990, managing upscale independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities in California and several other states under its Kisco Signature and Lifestyle brands.

organizations.name: Westmont Living
organizations.description: Family-owned senior living company based in San Diego operating independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities, primarily in California and the Pacific Northwest.

organizations.name: Vivante Living
organizations.description: Boutique luxury senior living brand operating resort-style assisted living and memory care communities in coastal Southern California, including Vivante on the Coast in Costa Mesa and Vivante Newport Center.

organizations.name: Merrill Gardens
organizations.description: Merrill Gardens is a family-owned senior living operator founded in Seattle by the R.D. Merrill family, running dozens of independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities across the country. Its communities are known for flexible anytime dining and month-to-month rental agreements.

organizations.name: Silvergate Retirement Residences
organizations.description: Silvergate Retirement Residences is a family-owned San Diego County operator with communities in Fallbrook, San Marcos, and Rancho Bernardo. Silvergate has served North County seniors for more than three decades with independent living, assisted living, and memory care.

organizations.name: Front Porch Communities and Services
organizations.description: Front Porch is a not-for-profit senior living organization formed from the 2021 merger of Front Porch and Covia, operating retirement and continuing care communities across California. Its portfolio includes Claremont Manor, Villa Gardens in Pasadena, and other life plan communities.

organizations.name: Generations Senior Living
organizations.description: Generations is a family-owned senior living company that develops and operates communities in the western United States, including the resort-style Paradise Village campus near San Diego. Its communities span independent living, assisted living, and memory care.

organizations.name: Watermark Retirement Communities
organizations.description: Tucson-based senior living operator managing roughly 40 communities nationwide, spanning independent living, assisted living and memory care. Known for its Watermark University resident-enrichment programming and upscale community designs.

organizations.name: Belmont Village Senior Living
organizations.description: Houston-based developer and operator of upscale senior living communities founded in 1997, with 33 communities concentrated in California, Texas and other major metros. Communities emphasize licensed-nurse staffing, research-based memory care programs and hotel-style hospitality.

organizations.name: Frontier Senior Living
organizations.description: Oregon-based operator (formerly Frontier Management) of over 100 senior living communities nationwide, with a heavy emphasis on stand-alone memory care. Its Montessori-inspired SPARK program is the core of its dementia-care approach.

organizations.name: Koelsch Communities
organizations.description: Family-owned senior living company founded in 1958 and now in its third generation of family leadership. Operates roughly 40 independent living, assisted living and memory care communities across eight states.

organizations.name: Prestige Care
organizations.description: Family-owned senior care company based in Vancouver, Washington, operating skilled nursing centers and senior living communities across the western U.S. Its assisted living communities include dedicated Expressions memory care programs.
